2026-06-25.en: Dewdrops await the dawn upon blades of grass.
2026-06-25.zh: 露珠在草叶上等待黎明。

2026-06-26.en: Longing is a letter without an address.

2026-06-27.en: Great people do things before they are ready.
2026-06-27.zh: 伟大的人在准备好前就行动。

2026-06-28.en: To succeed, want success more than you fear failure.
2026-06-28.zh: 渴望成功胜过害怕失败，方能成功。

2026-06-29.en: The radio crackles with hoarse memories.
2026-06-29.zh: 收音机发出沙哑的回忆。

2026-06-30.en: Stamps are tickets to distant lands.

2026-07-01.en: Focus on the present, not the past or future.
2026-07-01.zh: 不念过往，不畏将来，专注当下。

2026-07-02.en: Every raindrop falls from the clouds above.
2026-07-02.zh: 每一滴雨，都从云层里落下来。

2026-07-03.en: Light bulbs are like fruits that light up the night.
2026-07-03.zh: 灯泡像黑夜里结出的果实。

2026-07-04.en: Silence is the most perfect expression of scorn.
2026-07-04.zh: 沉默是轻蔑最完美的表达。

2026-07-05.en: No matter how long the rain lasts, there will be a rainbow.
2026-07-05.zh: 无论雨下多久，终见彩虹。

2026-07-06.en: Life is a question and how we live it is our answer.
2026-07-06.zh: 生活是一个问题，我们如何生活是我们的答案。

2026-07-07.en: Don’t burn bridges. A wide network provides support.
2026-07-07.zh: 别自断后路，广阔人脉网提供前进资源。

2026-07-08.en: All advantages aren't in running quickly, but in getting a head start.​
2026-07-08.zh: 优势不在于跑得快，而在于起身早。

2026-07-09.en: Stay curious, and the world stays fresh.
2026-07-09.zh: 保持好奇，世界永远新鲜。
